2604.26435.title: QYOLO: Lightweight Object Detection via Quantum Inspired Shared Channel Mixing
2604.26435.paper_summary: The rapid advancement of object detection architectures has positioned single stage detectors as the dominant solution for real-time visual perception. A primary source of computational overhead in these models lies in the deep backbone stages, where C2f bottleneck modules at high stride levels accumulate a disproportionate share of parameters due to quadratic scaling with channel width. This work introduces QYOLO, a quantum-inspired channel mixing framework that achieves genuine architectural compression by replacing the two deepest backbone C2f modules at P4/16 (512 channels) and P5/32 (1024 channels) with a compact QMixBlock. The proposed block performs global channel recalibration through a sinusoidal mixing mechanism with shared learnable parameters across both backbone stages, enforcing consistent channel importance without requiring independent per-stage parameter sets. The neck and detection head remain fully classical and unchanged. Evaluation on the VisDrone2019 benchmark demonstrates that QYOLOv8n achieves a 20.2% reduction in parameter count (3.01M to 2.40M) and 12.3% GFLOPs reduction with only 0.4 pp mAP@50 degradation. QYOLOv8s achieves 21.8% reduction with 0.1 pp degradation. When combined with knowledge distillation, full accuracy parity is recovered at no cost to compression. An expanded backbone plus neck variant achieved 38 to 41% reduction at the cost of greater accuracy degradation, motivating the backbone-only final design.
2604.26435.paper_summary_zh: 單階檢測器的快速進展使其成為實時視覺感知的主導解決方案。這些模型中的主要計算開銷來源於深層主幹階段，其中高步幅水平的C2f瓶頸模塊由於通道寬度的二次擴展而累積了不成比例的參數份額。本研究介紹了QYOLO，一種量子啟發的通道混合框架，通過用緊湊的QMixBlock替換P4/16（512通道）和P5/32（1024通道）中最深的兩個主幹C2f模塊來實現真正的架構壓縮。所提出的模塊通過一種正弦混合機制執行全局通道重新校準，並在兩個主幹階段之間共享可學習的參數，強制實現一致的通道重要性，而無需獨立的每階段參數集。頸部和檢測頭保持完全經典且不變。在VisDrone2019基準上的評估表明，QYOLOv8n實現了20.2%的參數數量減少（從3.01M減少到2.40M）和12.3%的GFLOPs減少，僅有0.4 pp的mAP@50降級。QYOLOv8s實現了21.8%的減少，降級為0.1 pp。當與知識蒸餾結合時，完全的準確性平衡在不影響壓縮的情況下得以恢復。一個擴展的主幹加頸部變體在更大的準確性降級成本下實現了38%至41%的減少，這促使了僅主幹的最終設計。
2604.26435.author: Garvit Kumar Mittal et.al.
2604.26435.authors: Garvit Kumar Mittal, Sahil Tomar, Sandeep Kumar
